seo.title: Top 10 Things to Do in Tallinn, Estonia
seo.description: Discover 10 must-see landmarks in Tallinn, Estonia. Free GPS routes, photos, and history.
seo.intro: Planning a trip to Tallinn? Explore the best places to visit in Tallinn, Estonia.
keywords: best places to visit in Tallinn

places.name: Tallinn Old Town
places.description: Historic medieval core of Tallinn with cobbled streets and centuries-old buildings.
places.seo_phrase: Tallinn Old Town - Medieval Historic Centre

places.name: Toompea Castle
places.description: Medieval castle on Toompea Hill, now home to Estonia's Parliament (Riigikogu).

places.name: Alexander Nevsky Cathedral
places.description: Orthodox cathedral built in 1900, famous for its ornate façade and golden domes.
places.seo_phrase: Alexander Nevsky Cathedral - Tallinn Orthodox Landmark

places.name: Kumu Art Museum
places.description: National art museum housing Estonia's largest art collection in a modern architectural space.
places.seo_phrase: Kumu Art Museum - Contemporary Art in Tallinn

places.name: Kadriorg Palace
places.description: Stately 18th-century Baroque palace and gardens, built for the Russian Tsar and now an art museum.

places.name: Telliskivi Creative City
places.description: Former factory area turned creative hub with design shops, street art, and cafes.
places.seo_phrase: Telliskivi Creative City - Trendy Arts District

places.name: Tallinn Seaplane Harbour
places.description: Interactive maritime museum in a historic seaplane hangar, featuring ships, submarines and exhibits.

places.name: Estonian Open Air Museum
places.description: Large outdoor museum with historic farmhouses, windmills and village churches from around Estonia.
places.seo_phrase: Estonian Open Air Museum - Rural Life History

places.name: Town Hall Square
places.description: Central plaza of Old Town, featuring Tallinn Town Hall and medieval merchants' houses.

places.name: Kadriorg Park
places.description: Expansive landscaped park around Kadriorg Palace, featuring fountains, swans and walking paths.

adventure.title: Estonia Nature & Road Trip Adventure
adventure.subtitle: Explore Estonia beyond the cities — national parks, bogs, and scenic coast.

seo.title: Estonia Road Trip — Nature Adventure Guide
seo.description: Plan a Estonia road trip with GPS stops, national parks, and scenic routes.
seo.intro: Explore Estonia beyond the cities with this nature adventure route.

places.name: Lahemaa National Park
places.description: Northern Estonia's first and largest national park with trails through woods and swamps.
places.seo_phrase: Lahemaa National Park - Estonia's Forest and Coast
places.commons_file: Wooden walkway in Lahemaa National Park, Estonia.jpg

places.name: Soomaa National Park
places.description: Southern Estonia park famous for its spring floods and peat bogs, ideal for canoeing.
places.seo_phrase: Soomaa National Park - Land of Bogs

places.name: Matsalu National Park
places.description: Western Estonia park on the Matsalu Bay, famous for spring bird migrations and reed-filled marshes.

places.name: Vilsandi National Park
places.description: Archipelago park west of Saaremaa, known for seals, coastal meadows and lighthouses.
places.seo_phrase: Vilsandi National Park - Island Nature Reserve

places.name: Karula National Park
places.description: Estonia's smallest national park with over 30 lakes and hilly terrain, offering peaceful trails.
places.seo_phrase: Karula National Park - Hilly Land of Lakes

places.name: Alutaguse National Park
places.description: Newest Estonian park with vast pine forests, bog trails and lakeside marshes.

places.name: Otepää Nature Park
places.description: Southern Estonia park around Otepää town, featuring the country's highest hills and lakes.
places.seo_phrase: Otepää Nature Park - Hilly South Estonia

places.name: Endla Nature Reserve
places.description: Central Estonia's reserve with large bogs and lakes, accessible by boardwalk trails.
places.seo_phrase: Endla Nature Reserve - Bog and Springs

places.name: Panga Cliff
places.description: Tall limestone cliff on Saaremaa's north coast, offering panoramic sea views.

places.name: Viru Bog Study Trail
places.description: Wooden boardwalk trail through a scenic raised bog near Loksa.
places.seo_phrase: Viru Bog Nature Trail - Lahemaa Boardwalk
